description: Book list in the hand of Shelomo ha-Levi, mentioning, among other items, Mishna tractates and their gemara (occasionally specifying the type of script), a commentary on Jeremiah, the Sefer Pitronot ha-Ḥalomot, the megillot, biblical books, a treatise on the leap-year, Arabic books, a commentary on the Prophets, and a commentary on Esther in Hebrew. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
